paper_title: Transformer-XL: Attentive Language Models Beyond a Fixed-Length Context

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a segment-level recurrence mechanism with relative positional encoding that allows the model to capture dependencies beyond a fixed-length context.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: WikiText-103, English Wikipedia, text8, and other large-scale text corpora
extraction_data.extension: Relative positional encoding combined with segment-level recurrence extends the effective context window compared to standard Transformers.
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, text generation, and downstream NLP tasks such as question answering and summarization
extraction_data.paper_title: Transformer-XL: Attentive Language Models Beyond a Fixed-Length Context

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a segment-level recurrence mechanism with relative positional encodings that enables modeling dependencies beyond a fixed-length context.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large‑scale text corpora (e.g., WikiText‑103, One Billion Word, enwik8, text8, Penn Treebank)
extraction_data.extension: Segment‑level recurrence and relative positional encodings extend the standard Transformer decoder.
extraction_data.application: Language modeling, text generation, downstream NLP tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Transformer-XL: Attentive Language Models Beyond a Fixed-Length Context
